atom_id.description: Optional; when present with replacement_text, used for prose overlay.

replacement_text.description: Optional; replacement prose for atom_id at render time (overlay only).

confidence.description: Optional; conflict policy: highest confidence wins, then newest ts.

plan_hash.description: Optional; hash of plan slot sequence when rec was generated. At overlay time, if present and not equal to current plan hash, overlay is skipped (staleness guard).
